message:
fix(agentdb): Lazy-load HNSWLibBackend to avoid import failures

Replace static import of HNSWLibBackend with dynamic import via
createHNSWLibBackend() function. This prevents module-level failures
on systems without native build tools (gcc, python, etc.) that are
required by hnswlib-node's native compilation.

The lazy loading ensures:
- Factory module loads successfully even without hnswlib-node
- Backend detection works independently of backend availability
- Graceful fallback behavior is preserved

Also adds missing lint-staged configuration (ESM format).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
